name: Mansei Corporation
summary: Mansei Corporation provides electric powered machines in Japan. The company engages in the provision of support services for the development and maintenance of electronic devices and multimedia systems; and sale of video and information machines. It also offers semiconductor products, including high-density memory, one-chip microcomputers, gate arrays, ASICs, etc.; and software for system design and development. In addition, the company provides computers for FA, flexible production systems, related control units, CAD/CAM systems NC, robots for industrial use, etc.; and various total systems, as well as operates a training school. Further, it offers industrial components and equipment, which include drive control units, such as AC servos and inverters; controllers comprising sequencers; power distribution units consisting of circuit breakers and transformers; and rotary machines, including motors and industrial fans. Additionally, the company provides industrial automation machinery; various transport machines, such as elevators and escalators for buildings, condominiums, and public facilities; and equipment for shops, as well as housing related products. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
